writer_point: The thesis uses 3D CFD as high-fidelity reference evidence for reduced-model development.
allowed_claim: CFD reference evidence motivates reduced modeling.

writer_point: Observed recirculation, wall/core contrast, and asymmetric upcomer behavior make an axisymmetric or 2D reduction an unsafe primary closure route.
A guarded 1D fluid+walls ROM can preserve branchwise pressure, thermal, source, recirculation, and admission metadata.
allowed_claim: 1D is chosen as an auditable systems model form.

writer_point: The contribution is a provenance-controlled admission workflow with negative results, not a single tuned coefficient.
allowed_claim: negative and blocked results are scientific outcomes.
not_allowed_claim: one final Nu, f_D, or K was validated.
